# Neighborhood Commons API

> Open neighborhood event data. No API key required to read. CC BY 4.0.

Base URL: https://commons.joinfiber.app
Spec: Neighborhood API v0.2 (https://github.com/The-Relational-Technology-Project/neighborhood-api)

## Quick Start

```bash
# List upcoming events (no auth needed)
curl "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events?limit=5"

# Filter by category and location
curl "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events?category=live-music&near=39.95,-75.16&radius_km=5"

# Subscribe in a calendar app
https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events.ics

# RSS feed
https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events.rss
```

## Authentication

No authentication required for reading events, feeds, or metadata.

Optional: pass an `X-API-Key` header for a dedicated rate limit bucket (1000 req/hr per key instead of per IP). An API key is required for webhook subscriptions.

Get a free API key: POST to `/api/v1/developers/register/send-otp` with your email, verify with the OTP, receive your key immediately. No approval required.

## Rate Limits

- 1000 requests/hour per IP address (or per API key if provided)
- Standard `RateLimit-Limit`, `RateLimit-Remaining`, `RateLimit-Reset` headers on every response
- Webhook write endpoints: 10/min
- Enumeration endpoints: 5/min

## Error Format

All errors return:
```json
{ "error": { "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "Human-readable explanation" } }
```

Status codes: 400 (bad request), 401 (no/invalid auth), 403 (forbidden), 404 (not found), 409 (conflict), 429 (rate limited), 500 (server error).

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/v1/events — List Events

Query parameters:
- `start_after` (string) — YYYY-MM-DD. Events starting on or after this date.
- `start_before` (string) — YYYY-MM-DD. Events starting before this date.
- `category` (string) — Filter by category slug (e.g., live-music, comedy, markets).
- `q` (string) — Text search in title and description. Max 200 chars.
- `near` (string) — Geo filter center: "lat,lng" (e.g., "39.95,-75.16").
- `radius_km` (number) — Radius from `near` in km. 0.1–100, default 10.
- `limit` (number) — Results per page. 1–200, default 50.
- `offset` (number) — Pagination offset. Default 0.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "meta": { "total": 42, "limit": 50, "offset": 0, "spec": "neighborhood-api-v0.2", "license": "CC-BY-4.0" },
  "events": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Jazz Night at South",
      "start": "2026-03-14T19:00:00-04:00",
      "end": "2026-03-14T22:00:00-04:00",
      "description": "Live jazz trio...",
      "category": ["live-music"],
      "place_id": "ChIJ...",
      "location": { "name": "South Jazz Kitchen", "address": "600 N Broad St, Philadelphia", "lat": 39.9632, "lng": -75.1551 },
      "url": "https://example.com/tickets",
      "images": ["https://..."],
      "organizer": { "name": "South Jazz Kitchen" },
      "cost": "Free",
      "recurrence": "weekly",
      "source": { "publisher": "South Jazz Kitchen", "collected_at": "2026-03-10T12:00:00Z", "method": "portal", "license": "CC BY 4.0" }
    }
  ]
}
```

Auth: None (optional X-API-Key).

### GET /api/v1/events/{id} — Single Event

Path: `id` is a UUID.

Response (200):
```json
{ "event": { ...same shape as list... } }
```

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/events.ics — iCalendar Feed

Returns `text/calendar` (RFC 5545). Up to 200 upcoming published events. Each VEVENT includes UID, DTSTART, DTEND, SUMMARY, DESCRIPTION, LOCATION, URL, GEO, RRULE as applicable.

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/events.rss — RSS Feed

Returns `application/rss+xml` (RSS 2.0). Up to 50 upcoming published events.

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/events/terms — License & Terms

Response (200):
```json
{
  "version": "2.0",
  "summary": "Neighborhood event data, free to use under CC BY 4.0.",
  "license": { "name": "Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International", "spdx": "CC-BY-4.0", "url": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/" },
  "guidelines": [
    "Attribution: Credit 'Neighborhood Commons' or link to this API.",
    "No surveillance: Don't use this data for ad targeting, behavioral profiling, or user tracking.",
    "Building products with this data is encouraged."
  ],
  "rate_limit": "1000 requests/hour per IP. Use X-API-Key header for a dedicated rate limit bucket.",
  "contact": "hello@joinfiber.app"
}
```

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/meta — Feed Metadata

Response (200):
```json
{
  "name": "Neighborhood Commons",
  "description": "Open neighborhood event data.",
  "spec": "neighborhood-api-v0.2",
  "stewards": [{ "name": "Fiber", "url": "https://joinfiber.app", "contact": "hello@joinfiber.app", "role": "maintainer" }],
  "data_sources": [{ "name": "Portal", "method": "portal", "description": "Events submitted directly by venue owners and promoters." }],
  "resources": ["events"],
  "license": { "name": "Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International", "spdx": "CC-BY-4.0" }
}
```

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/meta/regions — List Regions

Response (200, cached 1hr):
```json
{ "regions": [{ "id": "uuid", "name": "Philadelphia", "slug": "philadelphia", "timezone": "America/New_York", "latitude": 39.95, "longitude": -75.16 }] }
```

Auth: None.

### GET /api/v1/meta/categories — List Categories

Response (200, cached 30min):
```json
{ "categories": [{ "slug": "live-music", "key": "LIVE_MUSIC", "count": 12 }] }
```

Auth: None.

### GET /.well-known/neighborhood — API Discovery

Response (200):
```json
{
  "name": "Neighborhood Commons",
  "version": "0.2",
  "license": "CC-BY-4.0",
  "events_url": "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events",
  "ical_url": "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events.ics",
  "rss_url": "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events.rss",
  "terms_url": "https://commons.joinfiber.app/api/v1/events/terms"
}
```

Auth: None.

---

## API Key Registration

No admin approval required. Verify your email, get a key immediately.

### POST /api/v1/developers/register/send-otp — Request Verification Code

Body:
```json
{ "email": "dev@example.com" }
```

Response (200):
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Verification code sent to your email." }
```

Error: 409 if an API key already exists for this email.

### POST /api/v1/developers/register/verify-otp — Verify & Get Key

Body:
```json
{ "email": "dev@example.com", "token": "12345678", "name": "My App" }
```

Response (201):
```json
{
  "api_key": { "id": "uuid", "raw_key": "fib_a1b2c3d4...", "name": "My App", "rate_limit_per_hour": 1000, "created_at": "2026-03-11T..." },
  "message": "Save your raw_key — it will not be shown again."
}
```

Error: 401 (invalid OTP), 409 (key already exists).

### GET /api/v1/developers/me — Your Key Info

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Response (200):
```json
{
  "api_key": { "id": "uuid", "name": "My App", "contact_email": "dev@example.com", "rate_limit_per_hour": 1000, "webhook_count": 2, "created_at": "2026-03-11T..." }
}
```

### POST /api/v1/developers/keys/rotate — Rotate Key

Requires current API key + OTP re-verification. Call `/register/send-otp` first.

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required, current key)

Body:
```json
{ "email": "dev@example.com", "token": "12345678" }
```

Response (200):
```json
{
  "api_key": { "id": "uuid", "raw_key": "fib_newkey...", "name": "...", "rate_limit_per_hour": 1000, "created_at": "..." },
  "message": "Save your new raw_key — the old key has been deactivated."
}
```

Webhook subscriptions are automatically migrated to the new key.

---

## Webhooks

Real-time notifications when events are created, updated, or deleted. Requires an API key.

Event types: `event.created`, `event.updated`, `event.deleted`

### POST /api/v1/webhooks — Create Subscription

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Body:
```json
{ "url": "https://yourapp.com/webhooks/commons", "event_types": ["event.created", "event.updated"] }
```

Response (201):
```json
{
  "subscription": { "id": "uuid", "url": "https://...", "event_types": ["event.created", "event.updated"], "status": "active", "created_at": "..." },
  "signing_secret": "64-char-hex-string",
  "note": "Save the signing_secret — it will not be shown again."
}
```

Constraints: URL must be HTTPS. Max 5 subscriptions per API key. SSRF-protected.

### GET /api/v1/webhooks — List Subscriptions

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Response (200):
```json
{
  "subscriptions": [
    { "id": "uuid", "url": "...", "event_types": [...], "status": "active", "consecutive_failures": 0, "last_success_at": "...", "last_failure_at": null, "created_at": "...", "updated_at": "..." }
  ]
}
```

### PATCH /api/v1/webhooks/{id} — Update Subscription

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Body (all fields optional):
```json
{ "url": "https://...", "event_types": [...], "status": "active" }
```

Setting `status` to `"active"` resets `consecutive_failures` to 0.

### DELETE /api/v1/webhooks/{id} — Delete Subscription

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Response (200):
```json
{ "success": true }
```

### POST /api/v1/webhooks/{id}/test — Send Test Delivery

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Sends a signed test payload to your endpoint with event type `event.created`.

### GET /api/v1/webhooks/{id}/deliveries — Delivery History

Headers: `X-API-Key: fib_...` (required)

Query parameters:
- `status` (string) — Filter: pending, delivered, failed, retrying.
- `limit` (number) — 1–100, default 25.
- `offset` (number) — Default 0.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "deliveries": [
    { "id": "uuid", "event_type": "event.created", "event_id": "uuid", "status": "delivered", "http_status": 200, "attempt_number": 1, "created_at": "...", "delivered_at": "..." }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 10, "limit": 25, "offset": 0 }
}
```

### Webhook Payload Format

```json
{
  "event_type": "event.created",
  "event": { ...full event object... },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-14T12:00:00.000Z",
  "delivery_id": "42"
}
```

Headers sent: `X-Fiber-Signature` (HMAC-SHA256), `X-Fiber-Event` (event type), `Content-Type: application/json`.

### Verifying Webhook Signatures

```javascript
const crypto = require('crypto');
function verify(body, signature, secret) {
  const expected = 'sha256=' + crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(JSON.stringify(body)).digest('hex');
  return crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(signature), Buffer.from(expected));
}
```

### Delivery Behavior

- Your endpoint must respond 2xx within 10 seconds.
- Failed deliveries retry 3 times with backoff: 1 min, 5 min, 25 min.
- After 10 consecutive failures, the subscription is auto-disabled.
- Re-enable with PATCH: `{ "status": "active" }`.
- Delivery logs retained 30 days.

---

## Event Schema

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | string | UUID |
| name | string | Event title |
| start | string | ISO 8601 with timezone offset |
| end | string or null | End time |
| description | string or null | Plain text |
| category | string[] | Slugified categories (e.g., ["live-music"]) |
| place_id | string or null | Google Places ID |
| location | object | { name, address, lat, lng } |
| url | string or null | Ticket or event page URL |
| images | string[] | Image URLs (may be empty) |
| organizer | object | { name } |
| cost | string or null | "Free", "$10", "$5-15" |
| recurrence | string or null | Recurrence pattern (e.g., "weekly") |
| source | object | { publisher, collected_at, method, license } |

## License

All event data: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0).
Attribution: Credit "Neighborhood Commons" or link to the API.
Contact: hello@joinfiber.app
